query:
SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, acp.orbitEnabled, acp.uniqueAgentId
FROM users u
JOIN agent_crm_profiles acp ON acp.userId = u.id
WHERE u.name LIKE '%Laura%Rogers%';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4PycK9Y631tLhJa.0110aa12e67a --database PdcDVQRp8zC2FzsyWBWptW --execute
